title: zanthoxylum hasslerianum
intro: Zanthoxylum hasslerianum, also known as the Hassler's prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to the subtropical regions of South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and has been used to treat conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Zanthoxylum hasslerianum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be found in traditional remedies and supplements, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
